allow:
Bash(curl -s "https://maps.nextbike.net/maps/nextbike-live.flatjson" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Top-level keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)
if 'bikes' in d:
    b = d['bikes']
    print\('Bike count:', len\(b\)\)
    print\('First bike:', json.dumps\(b[0], indent=2\) if b else 'none'\)
else:
    print\('No bikes key'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && npm run dev 2>&1)
